features.name: draw_id
features.description: Unique draw identifier (state_game_date_drawtime)

features.name: draw_date
features.description: Draw date YYYY-MM-DD

features.name: state_code
features.description: 2-letter US state code

features.name: game_type
features.description: Game type: pick3/pick4/pick5/powerball/megamil/etc

features.name: draw_time
features.description: midday or evening

features.name: ball_position
features.description: Position index (0-based) in the draw

features.name: ball_number
features.description: The actual ball number value

features.name: winner_state
features.description: 1=drawn in actual result, 0=not drawn (TARGET for ML)

features.name: prediction_state
features.description: 1=predicted by model, 0=not predicted

features.name: best_practice_state
features.description: 1=passes all strategy filters, 0=fails one or more

features.name: overall_freq
features.description: Raw frequency count across all history

features.name: overall_freq_norm
features.description: Normalized frequency (0-1 scale, divided by max)

features.name: temporal_decay_freq
features.description: Frequency with temporal decay lambda=0.02

features.name: positional_freq
features.description: Frequency at this specific ball position

features.name: positional_freq_norm
features.description: Normalized positional frequency (0-1)

features.name: skip_value
features.description: Draws since last appearance (0=appeared last draw)

features.name: skip_normalized
features.description: Skip / max_possible_skip (0-1)

features.name: is_overdue
features.description: 1 if skip > SA threshold for this game

features.name: sa_level
features.description: Which SA level (1-5) this number belongs to

features.name: is_hot
features.description: 1 if freq >= 60% of max frequency

features.name: is_cold
features.description: 1 if freq < 30% of max frequency and freq > 0

features.name: is_warm
features.description: 1 if between hot and cold thresholds

features.name: is_prime_digit
features.description: 1 if last digit is 2,3,5,7

features.name: is_low_digit
features.description: 1 if digit/last-digit is 0-4

features.name: avg_pair_cooccurrence
features.description: Average co-occurrence score with other drawn numbers

features.name: max_pair_cooccurrence
features.description: Max co-occurrence with any single other number

features.name: fa_level
features.description: Frequency Analysis level (1-4, 1=top 30%)

features.name: in_fa_top30
features.description: 1 if in top 30% frequency

features.name: in_fa_top50
features.description: 1 if in top 50% frequency

features.name: combo_sum
features.description: Sum of all drawn numbers

features.name: combo_sum_in_range
features.description: 1 if sum within 85th percentile historical range

features.name: combo_odd_count
features.description: Number of odd numbers in the draw

features.name: combo_even_count
features.description: Number of even numbers in the draw

features.name: combo_oe_pattern
features.description: Odd/Even pattern e.g. '3O/2E'

features.name: combo_oe_is_top2
features.description: 1 if O/E pattern matches top-2 historical

features.name: combo_consec_sets
features.description: Number of consecutive number sets (e.g., 5-6 is 1 set)

features.name: combo_consec_ok
features.description: 1 if consecutive sets <= 2 (PDF strategy)

features.name: combo_ac_value
features.description: Arithmetic Complexity value

features.name: combo_ac_in_range
features.description: 1 if AC within ideal range for this game

features.name: combo_gap_conforms
features.description: 1 if gaps between numbers match 98% historical profile

features.name: min_gap
features.description: Minimum gap between consecutive sorted numbers

features.name: max_gap
features.description: Maximum gap between consecutive sorted numbers

features.name: avg_gap
features.description: Average gap between consecutive sorted numbers

features.name: combo_has_sk123
features.description: 1 if combo includes number from last 3 draws

features.name: sk123_match_count
features.description: How many numbers from last 3 draws are in this combo

features.name: combo_hot_count
features.description: Number of hot numbers in combo

features.name: combo_cold_count
features.description: Number of cold numbers in combo

features.name: combo_prime_count
features.description: Number of prime-digit numbers in combo

features.name: combo_low_count
features.description: Number of low-digit numbers in combo

features.name: combo_hcpl_ok
features.description: 1 if HCPL ratio within ideal historical range

features.name: combo_start_num
features.description: First number in sorted combo

features.name: combo_end_num
features.description: Last number in sorted combo

features.name: combo_start_ok
features.description: 1 if start number in top-80% historical starts

features.name: combo_end_ok
features.description: 1 if end number in top-80% historical ends

features.name: combo_spread
features.description: End - Start (range of combo)

features.name: combo_pattern
features.description: L/M/H zone pattern e.g. 'L-L-M-H-H'

features.name: combo_in_top27_pattern
features.description: 1 if pattern is among top 27 historical

features.name: combo_group
features.description: Decade grouping e.g. '1-1-1-1-1'

features.name: combo_in_top60_group
features.description: 1 if group is among top 60 historical

features.name: game_is_normal
features.description: 1 if game in Normal status, 0 if Unstable

features.name: game_unstable_count
features.description: Number of recent draws outside expected ranges

features.name: wf_hit_rate
features.description: Walk-forward backtest hit rate (0-1)

features.name: wf_hits
features.description: Walk-forward hits out of test window

features.name: wf_total
features.description: Walk-forward test window size

features.name: star_rating
features.description: 1-5 star rating from computeEnhancedStarRating

features.name: tracker_weight
features.description: Adaptive learning weight from PredictionTracker

features.name: tracker_hit_history
features.description: Historical hit rate for this number from tracker

features.name: day_of_week
features.description: 0=Mon, 6=Sun

features.name: draws_since_jackpot
features.description: Draws since last jackpot winner (if available)

winner_state.description: Was this ball number drawn in the actual draw?
winner_state.source: actual draw results from API extraction

prediction_state.description: Did our model predict this ball number for this draw?

best_practice_state.description: Does this ball satisfy best-practice strategy filters?
